channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mika Brzezinski becomes emotional during ICE detention discussion on MS NOW, Sen. Cory Booker responds
item.description: During a broadcast of MS NOW’s “Morning Joe,” co-host Mika Brzezinski became visibly emotional while discussing reported conditions in U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detention faciliti...

item.title: Jumia names Akinwumi Adesina to supervisory board to strengthen governance and profitability drive
item.description: Jumia Technologies, the NYSE-listed African e-commerce company, has announced the appointment of Dr. Akinwumi Adesina, former President of the African Development Bank (AfDB), into its supervisory boa...

item.title: Saint John police arrest robbery suspect over a year after store theft
item.description: Saint John police have successfully arrested a suspect in connection with a robbery that occurred over a year ago at a local store in New Brunswick. The investigation had been ongoing since the incide...

item.title: Young Australians face recurring redundancies in creative industries
item.description: In 2026, job insecurity is increasingly common in Australia's creative and knowledge sectors, particularly affecting young professionals. Connor Parissis, a PR professional in his twenties, recounts b...

item.title: HONOR 600 Series launches nationwide in South Africa with AI features and flagship hardware
item.description: HONOR South Africa has officially announced the nationwide availability of its new HONOR 600 Series, which includes the HONOR 600 and HONOR 600 Pro. The launch positions the devices as premium smartph...

item.title: EFInA Organises Consumer Protection Dialogues in Katsina LGAs, Benefits Over 1,000 Residents
item.description: EFInA through their Inclusion for All (I4All) initiative don successfully complete consumer protection sensitisation programmes for people for Mani and Malumfashi Local Government Areas for Katsina St...

item.title: Holly Madison’s career transition and estimated $16 million net worth after leaving the Playboy Mansion
item.description: Holly Madison, formerly known for her role as one of Hugh Hefner’s partners on the reality show The Girls Next Door, has built a successful independent career after leaving the Playboy Mansion in 2008...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi interacts with auto-rickshaw drivers in Delhi, discusses livelihood challenges
item.description: Congress leader and Leader of Opposition in Parliament, Rahul Gandhi, was seen interacting with a group of auto-rickshaw drivers in Delhi on Friday afternoon. As per reports and visuals shared by news...

item.title: Henry Mwinuka reaches BAL final with Rwanda’s RSSB Tigers after historic run
item.description: Tanzanian basketball coach Henry Mwinuka is on the verge of making big history in African basketball as he leads Rwanda’s RSSB Tigers into the Basketball Africa League (BAL) final. The final match is ...

item.title: Nazru’s arrival as a servant sparks gossip and suspicion in Jameel’s household
item.description: The excerpt from Muhammad Hasan Askari’s translated Urdu short story ‘Slipperiness’, featured in ‘The Best of Urdu Short Stories’, revolves around Jameel and his new servant Nazru, whose behaviour qui...

item.title: Trump linked to dismissal of Nevada illegal laboratory-related charges involving foreign national case
item.description: A Raw Story report describes a controversial legal and political situation in which U.S. President Donald Trump is described as an “active participant” in the dismissal of a federal charge tied to a N...

item.title: Stellenbosch University expels two students over residence room invasion and furniture removal incident
item.description: Two Stellenbosch University students have been expelled from all university residences following a disciplinary ruling over a disturbing incident involving the invasion of a fellow student’s room and ...

item.title: Carlton Blues and Geelong Cats battle in thrilling AFL contest at the MCG
item.description: In a highly entertaining AFL match at the Melbourne Cricket Ground, the Carlton Blues faced off against the Geelong Cats in front of a massive crowd exceeding 60,000 spectators. The game lived up to i...

item.title: CNN sues Perplexity for alleged copyright infringement over use of news content
item.description: CNN has filed a lawsuit against AI search company Perplexity in a New York federal court, accusing it of unlawfully copying and distributing its copyrighted content. According to the complaint, Perple...

item.title: Parents seek answers after Utumishi Girls Academy fire leaves deaths, injuries and missing students
item.description: A tragic incident at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil, Nakuru County, has left parents distressed and seeking urgent answers after a dormitory fire resulted in loss of life, injuries, and uncertainty ...

item.title: Samia calls for enhanced community policing and stronger trust between police and citizens
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has called for deeper trust and cooperation between the Tanzania Police Force and citizens, stressing that effective national security depends on active public participat...

item.title: Siddaramaiah discusses future role and cabinet demands after stepping down as Karnataka Chief Minister
item.description: Outgoing Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah met senior Congress leaders in New Delhi a day after resigning from his post, marking a key moment in the political transition within the state. During h...

item.title: Eight students arrested over suspected arson attack at Utumishi Girls School dormitory in Gilgil
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) in Kenya has arrested eight students believed to be linked to a suspected arson attack at Utumishi Girls Senior Secondary School in Gilgil, which resul...

item.title: Blue Origin New Glenn rocket destroyed during Florida hot-fire test ahead of satellite mission
item.description: Blue Origin suffered a major setback after its uncrewed New Glenn rocket exploded during a hot-fire test on a launchpad in Florida. The incident happened while the company was preparing for the rocket...

item.title: Tony Abbott calls for major Liberal Party membership drive amid internal and electoral pressures
item.description: Tony Abbott, newly elected unopposed as federal president of the Liberal Party, has urged the organisation to significantly expand its membership base, describing the current moment as a period of “ex...
